raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ta fakka tas
Klings KUNGS: Rangi/man-
na Dutmiba un manna Bahr-
siba tsgahsifees pahr scho Wee-
tu/ pahr Zilwekeim / un pahr
Lohpeim/ un pahr teem Kohkeim
Meschä / un pahr tahm Dru-
wahm us Semmes / un degs/
un ne taps tsdschsta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta fakka tas KUNGS
Zebnot/ tas Israëta Deews:
Leezeet juhsus Dedsaimo-Uppu-
kus klaht pee juhfeem zitteem Up-
pureem/ un ehdeet Galtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es ne efinu ar juhfeem
Tehweem runnajs/ nedß paweh-
lejs tannt Deenä/ kad es tohs no
Egiptes-Semnes isweddnu/ par
Dedsaimo-Uppureem jeb zitteem
Uppureem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet fcho Wahrdn efmu
es teem pawehlejs/ un fazzijs:
Klausfajt mannu Balkni / tad
buhfschu es juhs par Deewu/ un
juhs buhfeet man par Landim /
un staigajt us wifnu to Zettu/ ko
es juhs pawehleschu / ka juhs
labbi klahjahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee ne irr klausijtcht/
nedß fawas Aufis atgreeusfschi/
bet statgajfschi eekfch teem Pa-
dohmeein pehz tawas faunas
Sirde Prahta/ un irr atpakkat-
greesufschees/ un ne uhs Preekfschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "No tahs Deenas/ kad
juhsu Tehwi irr tsgahjufscht no
Egiptes-Semnes lihds schodeen/
efmu es pee Laika pee juhs juh-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee manni ne irr kla-
fijfchi/ nedß fawas Aufis atgr-
sfichi/ bet irr fawu Pakau
apzeetinafschi nifnaki turred
mees neka winno Tehwi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tew buhs arridsan w
fusß schoß Wahrdus us wi-
xeem runnaht/ bet tee tewi
klausfhs/ tu tohs gann aizina-
bet tee ne atbildens.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz fakki us teen
Schee irr tee Laudis / kas pe-
ta KUNGA fawa Deewa Ball-
ni ne klahta/ un to Pamah-
tchanu ne peekeimm. Ta Pate-
siba irr bohja gahjust/ un isn-
kusi no winnu Muttes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nozehrp tarus Mattu
un atmiett tohs nohst / un ra-
ganschi us teem Augstumeen-
jo tas KUNGS irr to Radd-
pahr fo wiisch apskaitces/ a-
mettis un atstabjis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tee Behrni Juhda i-
darriftchi / kas kanns irr ma-
näs Azzis/ fakka tas KUNGS
Tee irr fawas Negantibas lik-
tchi eekfch ta Naimma/ kas pet-
manna Wahrdä nosaukts tr-
to paschn sagahnht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un irr uszehluschi tol
Augstums Toweles/eekfch tat-
Eeletjas Ben-Innoma / ka t-
fawus Dehlus un fawas Meit-
ar llggunt fadedsinatu / ko es i-
efmu pawehlejs/ ir kas mann-
Sirfi ne irr nahzts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht raugi/ tahs De-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
